about.title: About AURA ARCHIVE
about.subtitle: Curated Luxury for the Discerning Collector
about.storyText1: Founded in 2026, AURA ARCHIVE was born from a passion for timeless fashion and sustainable luxury. We believe that beautiful pieces deserve a second life, and that every item carries a story worth preserving.
about.storyText2: Our team of experts carefully authenticates and curates each piece in our collection, ensuring that every item meets our high standards of quality and authenticity.
about.missionText: To make luxury fashion more accessible and sustainable by connecting discerning buyers with authenticated pre-owned designer pieces.
about.authenticityDesc: Every piece is verified by our expert authentication team
about.qualityDesc: We only accept items in excellent condition
about.sustainabilityDesc: Extending the life of luxury fashion
about.teamDesc: Meet the passionate experts behind AURA ARCHIVE

legal.termsDesc: Terms and conditions for using AURA ARCHIVE
legal.privacyDesc: How we collect, use, and protect your data
legal.termsIntroText: By accessing and using our website, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provisions of this agreement. Please read these terms carefully before using our services.
legal.accountTerm1: You must be at least 18 years old to create an account
legal.accountTerm2: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account
legal.accountTerm3: You must provide accurate and complete information
legal.accountTerm4: You may not use our service for any illegal purposes
legal.productInfoText: We strive to ensure accuracy in product descriptions and images:
legal.productTerm1: All products are authenticated by our expert team
legal.productTerm2: Condition descriptions are provided for each item
legal.productTerm3: Colors may vary slightly due to screen settings
legal.ordersPaymentText: All orders are subject to acceptance and availability. Payment must be received before orders are processed. We accept various payment methods including credit cards, bank transfer, and digital wallets.
legal.shippingReturnsText: We offer worldwide shipping with tracking. Returns are accepted within 14 days of delivery for items in original condition. Please refer to our Returns Policy for complete details.
legal.intellectualPropertyText: All content on this website, including text, graphics, logos, and images, is the property of AURA ARCHIVE and protected by intellectual property laws. Unauthorized use is prohibited.
legal.questionsText: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us.
legal.privacyIntroText: At AURA ARCHIVE, we are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring the security of your personal information. This policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your data.
legal.dataCollectionText: We collect information that you provide directly to us:
legal.dataType3: Payment information (processed securely through our payment providers)
legal.dataUsageText: We use the information we collect to:
legal.usage2: Communicate with you about your orders and account
legal.cookiesText: We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your browsing experience, analyze site traffic, and personalize content. You can manage cookie preferences through your browser settings.
legal.dataSecurityText: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your personal information. All transactions are encrypted using SSL technology. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure.
legal.privacyQuestionsText: If you have any questions about our Privacy Policy, please contact us.

faqs.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqs.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about AURA ARCHIVE
faqs.a1: Every item goes through a rigorous multi-point authentication process by our team of experts. We verify materials, hardware, stitching, labels, and serial numbers against known standards for each brand.
faqs.q2: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.a2: We accept credit/debit cards (Visa, Mastercard), bank transfers, MoMo wallet, VNPay, and PayPal for international orders.
faqs.a3: Domestic orders within Vietnam are typically delivered within 2-5 business days. International shipping takes 7-14 business days depending on the destination.
faqs.a4: Yes, we accept returns within 14 days of delivery for items in their original condition with all tags attached. Please refer to our Returns & Exchanges page for full details.
faqs.a5: Yes, we ship worldwide. International shipping rates and delivery times vary by destination. All international orders include tracking.
faqs.q6: How do I track my order?
faqs.a6: Once your order is shipped, you will receive a tracking number via email. You can also track your order status from your account dashboard.
faqs.contactText: Our team is here to help. Don't hesitate to reach out.

shippingPage.title: Shipping Information
shippingPage.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our shipping policies
shippingPage.domesticText: We offer fast and reliable shipping across Vietnam with the following options:
shippingPage.domestic1: Standard Shipping: 3-5 business days — Free on orders over 5,000,000₫
shippingPage.domestic3: All orders include tracking and signature confirmation
shippingPage.internationalText: We ship to over 50 countries worldwide:
shippingPage.international1: Standard International: 7-14 business days — Rates calculated at checkout
shippingPage.international2: Express International: 3-5 business days — Available for select destinations
shippingPage.trackingText: Once your order has been shipped, you will receive a confirmation email with your tracking number. You can also track your order at any time from your account dashboard under 'My Orders'.
shippingPage.questionsText: If you have any questions about shipping, please contact us.

returnsPage.title: Returns & Exchanges
returnsPage.subtitle: Our hassle-free return and exchange policy
returnsPage.policyText: We want you to be completely satisfied with your purchase. If you're not happy with your order, you may return it under the following conditions:
returnsPage.policy1: Items must be returned within 14 days of delivery
returnsPage.policy2: Items must be in original condition with all tags attached
returnsPage.policy3: Items must be unworn, unwashed, and free from alterations
returnsPage.step1: Log into your account and navigate to 'My Orders'
returnsPage.step2: Select the order and click 'Request Return' for the item(s) you wish to return
returnsPage.step3: Pack the item securely and ship it using the provided return label
returnsPage.exchangeText: We currently do not offer direct exchanges. To exchange an item, please return the original item for a refund and place a new order for the desired item.
returnsPage.refundText: Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days after we receive and inspect the returned item. The refund will be issued to your original payment method.
returnsPage.needHelpText: Our customer service team is ready to assist you.

chat.welcomeFallback: Welcome to AURA ARCHIVE! How can I help you today?
